toasts.node-delete-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this member?
toasts.node-delete-confirm-description: This will also delete all their relationships. This action cannot be undone.

errors.error-family-exists: A family with this name already exists.
errors.error-family-admin-required: At least one admin user is required.
errors.error-no-permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.error-user-already-in-family: User is already a member of the family.
errors.username-too-long: Username cannot be longer than 40 characters.
errors.error-nodes-not-found: One or more members not found.
errors.error-relationship-already-exists: A relationship already exists between these members.
errors.error-cannot-connect-to-self: Cannot create a relationship with the same member.
errors.error-would-create-cycle: This relationship would create a family cycle.
errors.error-cannot-connect-siblings: Cannot create a parent-child relationship between siblings.
errors.error-child-has-max-parents: A child cannot have more than 2 parents.

login.login-text: Sign in to access all your families and create new ones.
login.login-error: An error occurred while signing in.

family.title: Families
family.name: Name
family.family-types-info: The styling and features may vary based on the selected type.
family.family-types-alert: Bear in mind that this choice is permanent and cannot be changed later.
family.family-node-image-info: If enabled, each tree node will display an image representing the family member.
family.family-node-gallery-info: If enabled, each family member will have its own image gallery.
family.family-members-info: Manage the users who have access to this family.
family.family-member-role: The role determines the level of access the user has within the family.
family.family-member-remove-confirm-description: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the family?

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Here you can view and modify your personal information.
profile.private-description: Enable this option to make your profile and your families visible only to you and your family members.
profile.name: Name
profile.email-hint: Email address is managed by your OAuth provider.
profile.email-unmatched: The email address does not match.
profile.account-delete-text: This will permanently delete your account and all your families.
profile.account-delete-prompt: To confirm, please typo your email address:
profile.account-delete-error: An error occurred while deleting your account.
profile.account-logout-text: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.account-logout-error: An error occurred while logging out.
